stories.headline: Ariana Grande Look-Alike Paige Niemann Says She Felt 'Misled' by Star's DM - TMZ
stories.summary: Ariana Grande's viral look-alike Paige Niemann says she felt "misled" by the direct message the popstar sent her amid her rise to online fame years ago.

Exclusive | Inside Margaret Qualley and Jack Antonoff's breakup as former couple navigate split with 'love and kindness' - Page Six
stories.summary: Antonoff and Qualley quietly separated after almost three years of marriage earlier this week.

stories.headline: Jason Kelce Drank a Lot of Beers at the Tayvis Wedding - Vulture
stories.summary: Jason and Kylie Kelce are protective of their sister-in-law, Taylor Swift’s, privacy, but they’re not shy about sharing how much fun they had at her and Travis Kelce’s wedding.

stories.headline: Live-action remake of 'Moana' gets ravaged by critics in latest blow to Disney Studios - Fox News
stories.summary: The live-action "Moana" remake debuted at 38% on Rotten Tomatoes, with critics calling Dwayne Johnson's wig laughable and the film purposeless.

stories.headline: I think I know who Danhausen’s special friend will be at Saturday Night’s Main Event - Cageside Seats
stories.summary: Why settle for Baron Corbin’s return to WWE when Danhausen can instead have several champions in his corner at MSG?

stories.headline: ‘Big Brother’ player explains pulling himself off season 28 right before stepping into house - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: ‘Big Brother’ player Levi Banks explains pulling himself off season 28 right before stepping into the house: ‘That was probably the hardest decision of my entire life.’
